data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: Test 23 (_create_from_json_payload) has no companion test verifying the fast-abort within _run_acli itself — i.e., that subprocess.run is called exactly once and no retry occurs when 'User not found for email:' is present. The existing tests verify the None return value correctly, but a retry-count assertion would guard against regressions where the fast-abort condition is accidentally removed from _run_acli while the caller-level catch is retained.
File: tests/scripts/test_acli_integration.py
Category: verification
data.title: [acli-integration]: _run_acli fast-abort for assignee errors lacks retry-count assertion in tests
